narrative:
Brush Creek Twp township has 256 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points.
